name: Automatic Hard Example Synthesis with Multi-Level Agentic Data Curation

description: arXiv:2607.14256v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are increasingly deployed for nuanced content safety and moderation tasks, yet they remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks and out-of-distribution edge cases. Traditional active learning and manual annotation fail to scale against the complexity and volume of novel multimodal threats. In this paper, we pr...
